sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي الْخُضْرَوَاتُ الطَّازِجَةُ عَلَى الْفِيتَامِينَاتِ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Svježe povrće sadrži vitamine neophodne za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Fresh vegetables contain essential vitamins for the body.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَغْسِلَ الْفَوَاكِهَ جَيِّدًا قَبْلَ تَنَاوُلِهَا.
sentences.translation: Moramo dobro oprati voće prije nego što ga pojedemo.
sentences.translationEn: We must wash fruits well before eating them.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الطَّعَامُ الصِّحِّيُّ فِي تَقْوِيَةِ جِهَازِ الْمَنَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zdrava hrana pomaže u jačanju imunološkog sistema.
sentences.translationEn: Healthy food helps in strengthening the immune system.
